actionUnits.condition: XR Interaction Toolkit interactable: m_Activated PersistentCalls configured on PrefabInstance(763022183). XRGrabInteractable (MonoBehaviour id 763022187; guid 0ad34abafad169848a38072baa96cdb2) has m_Activated PersistentCalls configured to invoke LaunchProjectile.Fire (MonoBehaviour id 763022186; guid 623c5848030e9674893bb3bb376834b8) and PlayQuickSound.Play (MonoBehaviour id 763022189; guid 0755a2ba17a31d643b4a27e3034d8a79). MonoBehaviour_0 on LeftHand Ray Controller (id: 172617727) has m_Script {fileID:11500000, guid:cf14522d53cc1594991c164e785780dc, type:3}, which is ToggleRay. Serialized fields: forceToggle=0, directInteractor fileID=235308789. Awake() already invoked at enable (SwitchInteractors(false)). To cover ActivateRay(), simulate user enabling the ray when directInteractor is not touching any objects. If directInteractor has no valid targets, ActivateRay will SwitchInteractors(true).
After ActivateRay sets isSwitched=true, call DeactivateRay() to cover the path that switches back (SwitchInteractors(false)). This validates toggling back when ray was previously activated.

MonoBehaviour_0 on RightHand Ray Controller (id: 1287520551) uses script ToggleRay {fileID:11500000, guid:cf14522d53cc1594991c164e785780dc, type:3}. Serialized fields: forceToggle=0, directInteractor fileID=474225665. Awake() auto-executes SwitchInteractors(false) on enable. To cover ActivateRay() path, ensure the directInteractor is not touching any objects (TouchingObject()==false), then call ActivateRay() to switch to ray (isSwitched=true).
After ActivateRay() sets isSwitched=true, call DeactivateRay() to cover the switch back path (SwitchInteractors(false)).

Simulate XR SelectEntered on TeleportAnchorWithFade (MonoBehaviour id: 631718164, script guid: 474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6). This should only invoke the fade-wrapped teleport if teleportTrigger == TeleportTrigger.OnSelectEntered. Requires that the object has a Collider (XRBaseInteractable/TeleportationAnchor usually do) and that a FadeCanvas exists in the scene.

Simulate XR SelectExited on TeleportAnchorWithFade (MonoBehaviour id: 631718164, script guid: 474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6). This should only invoke the fade-wrapped teleport if teleportTrigger == TeleportTrigger.OnSelectExited. Requires a Collider and a valid FadeCanvas present.

Simulate XR Activated on TeleportAnchorWithFade (MonoBehaviour id: 631718164, script guid: 474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6). This should only invoke the fade-wrapped teleport if teleportTrigger == TeleportTrigger.OnActivated. Requires a Collider and a valid FadeCanvas present.

Simulate XR Deactivated on TeleportAnchorWithFade (MonoBehaviour id: 631718164, script guid: 474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6). This should only invoke the fade-wrapped teleport if teleportTrigger == TeleportTrigger.OnDeactivated. Requires a Collider and a valid FadeCanvas present.
